title: Enforce atomic Rust Path Sequence snapshots
description: In Rust DaoManager, retain canonical per-target candidate snapshots (parent, Path Control, Path Lifetime) through freshness tombstones. A newer Path Sequence atomically replaces the complete set; equal sequence accepts only semantic equality without refreshing deadlines or target freshness; changed/older/incomparable updates reject before DAOSequence mutation. Keep non-/128 wire rejection.
acceptance_criteria: Exact equal-sequence copies accept unchanged with newer DAOSequence but do not refresh route deadlines; additions/removals/lifetime/Path Control/withdrawal changes reject atomically; newer grouped multiparent snapshots replace fully; expiry/withdrawal tombstones prevent revival; Rust tests, clippy, and three reviews pass.
close_reason: Implemented and validated atomic complete-candidate Path Sequence snapshots in Rust, including exact-copy no-refresh semantics, bounded lifecycle state, expiry reporting, and node integration.
